title: Mythic Armory
description:
5 new armor sets
5 new tool set
5 new weapon sets
body:
# Mythic Armory

Mythic Armory expands Minecraft’s progression with powerful new armor sets and tools, designed to feel balanced, rewarding, and vanilla-friendly.

This datapack focuses on adding high-quality gear while laying the groundwork for future mythic content.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

## New Armor Sets

Mythic Armory introduces 5 brand-new armor tiers, each with its own identity:

Platinum Armor

Enderite Armor

Emerald Armor

Amethyst Armor

Oblivara Armor

Each set is fully craftable and balanced for survival gameplay.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### New Tools & Weapons

Every material includes a full tool set:

Swords

Axes

Pickaxes

Shovels

Hoes

Designed to slot naturally into progression without replacing vanilla gear too early.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Work in Progress**

The following features are planned but not yet implemented:

Shields

Spears

Abilities & advancements

These will be added in future updates as development continues.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**ALWAYS DOWNLOAD THE RP**
